title: gymnanthemum capense
intro: Gymnanthemum capense, also known as African sage or wild sage, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its ability to provide health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Gymnanthemum capense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and to address various health concerns.
